criteria_map: Independent `novaic-sandbox-core` package exists and owns sandbox substrate: success.
Start/deploy/test scripts explicitly include sandbox-core: success.
evidence: `novaic-sandbox-core/sandbox_core` contains contracts, client, process, mount namespace, and filesystem modules.
`find novaic-common/common -maxdepth 2 -type d -name sandbox -print` returned no paths.
Targeted tests, common tests, shell syntax checks, import smoke, and local sandboxd live smoke passed.
execution_map: Implemented physical extraction, import rewrites, script/deploy wiring, and old package/test deletion.
residual_risk: Service config remains in novaic-common by design; sandbox execution substrate no longer lives there.
stress_test: Ran targeted unit tests, common full tests, syntax checks, residue scans, import smoke, and local sandboxd live execute smoke.
C000.summary: Sandbox core final extraction verified: active code uses sandbox_core, old common.sandbox removed, deploy/start/test wiring complete, tests and live smoke pass.

P000.description: `common/sandbox` is still a halfway architecture: the sandbox substrate is generic infrastructure but lives under the broad `novaic-common` package. The desired final shape is an independent base package/server boundary where Cortex and sandboxd depend on `sandbox_core`, while `novaic-common` keeps configuration/shared app contracts only.
success_criteria: A new independent `novaic-sandbox-core` package owns sandbox contracts, client, process runner, mount namespace, and filesystem helpers.
Tests move with the new package and pass.
Start/deploy/test scripts include `novaic-sandbox-core` explicitly in PYTHONPATH/sync/test matrix.
Source scans show no `common.sandbox` import residue.
P000.title: Extract sandbox substrate out of common into sandbox-core final shape

done: Created `novaic-sandbox-core` as the independent sandbox substrate package.
Moved sandbox contracts, client, process runner, mount namespace helpers, filesystem helpers, and substrate tests into `novaic-sandbox-core/sandbox_core`.
Removed the old `novaic-common/common/sandbox` package and the old `novaic-common/tests/test_sandbox_infra.py` test file.
Rewired active import paths in Cortex and sandboxd from `common.sandbox` to `sandbox_core`.
Updated `scripts/start.sh` so sandboxd and Cortex explicitly include `novaic-sandbox-core` on `PYTHONPATH`.
Updated `scripts/run_all_tests.sh` so sandbox-core has its own test step and sandbox-service/Cortex tests include the core package explicitly.
Updated `deploy` so all backend restart paths sync the sandbox substrate package and sandboxd daemon before `start.sh` is invoked.
R000.summary: Extracted sandbox substrate from novaic-common into independent novaic-sandbox-core, rewired Cortex/sandboxd/start/deploy/tests, removed old common.sandbox, and verified with targeted tests plus live sandboxd smoke.
verification: `bash -n deploy && bash -n scripts/start.sh && python3 scripts/ci/lint_deploy_fresh_smoke.py` passed.
Local sandboxd live smoke passed: `/health` returned OK and `/v1/execute` returned `exit_code=0`.
Residue scan found no `common.sandbox` or `common/sandbox` references outside ignored generated/cache paths.

acceptance_criteria: `novaic-sandbox-core` contains the sandbox substrate and tests.
Targeted tests pass for sandbox-core, sandboxd, and Cortex wiring.
assumptions: `novaic-common` still owns service config, including `sandboxd` URL. This ticket only extracts sandbox execution substrate.
T000.classification_reason: This is a bounded physical module extraction with direct import/script rewrites and targeted tests.
T000.problem_definition: The sandbox substrate is generic infrastructure and should not live in broad `novaic-common`. Keeping it there makes dependency ownership ambiguous and invites future business/common coupling.
T000.proposed_solution: Create `novaic-sandbox-core/sandbox_core`, move the current sandbox primitives and tests into it, rewrite Cortex and sandboxd imports, update PYTHONPATH/deploy/test scripts, delete `novaic-common/common/sandbox`, and verify with targeted tests and residue scans.
risks: Some existing tests or scripts may still assume `common.sandbox`; source scans must catch these.
T000.title: Move sandbox substrate from common to independent sandbox-core
T000.verification_plan:
- Run sandbox-core tests.
- Run sandboxd service tests with `novaic-sandbox-core` on PYTHONPATH.
- Run Cortex sandboxd wiring tests with `novaic-sandbox-core` on PYTHONPATH.
- Run shell syntax checks and residue scans.
